message:
test(e2e): add CSV escaping and query override tests

CSV escaping test (e2e_list_csv_escaping):
- Creates issues with commas and double quotes in titles
- Verifies CSV field count consistency across all rows
- Validates proper quoting of special characters

Query override test (e2e_saved_queries_run_with_overrides):
- Saves a query with type=bug filter
- Runs it to verify only bugs returned
- Runs with --type=feature override, verifies CLI args
  take precedence over saved query filters

Part of beads_rust-2pqk (new feature parity tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
